title: Newcastle Beer Mats x9
features: PERFECT GIFT FOR NEWCASTLE FANS – The ideal present for birthdays, Christmas, Father’s Day or any occasion. Great gift idea for men, dads, brothers or mates who love The Magpies.
9 UNIQUE NEWCASTLE DESIGNS – Each set features artwork inspired by club legends, iconic goals, memorable moments and St James’ Park itself.
AUTHENTIC PUB-STYLE QUALITY – Printed on traditional 1.4mm pulp board for that classic beer mat feel straight from your local.
MADE FOR HOME BARS AND MATCHDAYS – Perfect for your bar setup, man cave or coffee table on matchday.
DESIGNED AND PRINTED IN THE UK – Created by Boot & Ball in our signature style, with every design crafted by hand and no AI involved.
description: Product Description Beer Mats by Boot & Ball Product Features Design Meticulously designed beer mats inspired by iconic sportspeople, their nations and beer from around the world. The closer you look the more details you’ll spot. Authenticity Printed on traditional pulp, our mats give you the authentic look and feel of a beer mat from the local. Small Business Designed by Jack, Boot & Ball’s Co-Founder, and manufactured in Chesterfield, UK. Unique The perfect gift for a sports fan 0 can be used as beer mats or framed like a piece of art.
